'''Vviir Wiamdi''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[ruetsavii]]. He, along with two other members, were sent to study the Gand [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Ooryl Qrygg]] and see if he was worthy of being named ''[[janwuine]]''. Not only did he watch Ooryl, but he joined the infamous [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], of which Qrygg was a member. He was very adept at piloting and even served as an undercover operative.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
